TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Huw-ing-zen-ce 火影忍者 "Huw-ing-zen-ce" 'kamu nu Zipun, "NARUTO -ナルト- , nipangangan, Huw-ing, u bangga nu Zipun nisanga'an ni An-pen-ci-s nu masakapahay a bangga, musakamu tu humhum sanay miliwliw tu kitakit u maluaaday ci Si-yen-wo-min-zen atu ci I-ce-pow-cwo-cu iza henay ku tatusaay a tademaw, tuzuma a malaangangay nikayzaan a kungku. u banggu namakay 1999 a mihcaan malingatu i Zipu a ci-ing-ze tungusay nu masakapahay banggu zasi "sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" tu lalid nu sinbunnu. 2002 amihcaan, pikawawan u saungayay a bangga Studio Pierrot duduc tu nisumad a bangga nu misaungayaya i tilibi a "Huw-ing-zenay" malingatu i Zipu Tukiw a tilibi tahkal. 2004 a mihcaan, macakat ku bangnga sumad han palaiga. 2006 a mihcaan Syen-wo-min a tademaw micumud i Ameylika a "sinbun" nu Zipinay u 10 a bulad 18 a demiad anipatahkal tu micidekay anipili'an "u kasenengay i hamin nu kitakit tu 100 ku tademaw nu Zipu". Jump" Studio Pierrot ".
S.PHON: ħuw-iŋ-zən-ʦə **** "ħuw-iŋ-zən-ʦə" ʔ~ʡkamu nu zipun, "na*uto -***- , nipaŋaŋan, ħuw-iŋ, u baŋga nu zipun nisaŋaʔ~ʡan ni an-pən-ʦi-s nu masakapaħaj a baŋga, musakamu tu ħumħum sanaj mir~ɾiwr~ɾiw tu kitakit u mar~ɾuaadaj ʦi si-jən-wo-min-zən atu ʦi i-ʦə-pow-ʦwo-ʦu iza ħənaj ku tatusaaj a tadəmaw, tuzuma a mar~ɾaaŋaŋaj nikajzaan a kuŋku. u baŋgu namakaj **** a miħʦaan mar~ɾiŋatu i zipu a ʦi-iŋ-zə tuŋusaj nu masakapaħaj baŋgu zasi "sinbun nu masakapaħaj *ump" tu r~ɾar~ɾid nu sinbunnu. **** amiħʦaan, pikawawan u sauŋajaj a baŋga studio piərrot duduʦ tu nisumad a baŋga nu misauŋajaja i tir~ɾibi a "ħuw-iŋ-zənaj" mar~ɾiŋatu i zipu tukiw a tir~ɾibi taħkar~ɾ. **** a miħʦaan, maʦakat ku baŋŋa sumad ħan par~ɾaiga. **** a miħʦaan sjən-wo-min a tadəmaw miʦumud i amər~ɾika a "sinbun" nu zipinaj u ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad anipataħkar~ɾ tu miʦidəkaj anipir~ɾiʔ~ʡan "u kasənəŋaj i ħamin nu kitakit tu *** ku tadəmaw nu zipu". *ump" studio piərrot ".
S.FORM: Huw-ing-zen-ce 火影忍者 "Huw-ing-zen-ce" 'kamu nu Zipun, "NARUTO -ナルト- , nipangangan, Huw-ing, u bangga nu Zipun nisanga'an ni An-pen-ci-s nu masakapahay a bangga, musakamu tu humhum sanay miliwliw tu kitakit u maluaaday ci Si-yen-wo-min-zen atu ci I-ce-pow-cwo-cu iza henay ku tatusaay a tademaw, tuzuma a malaangangay nikayzaan a kungku. u banggu namakay 1999 a mihcaan malingatu i Zipu a ci-ing-ze tungusay nu masakapahay banggu zasi "sinbun nu masakapahay Jump" tu lalid nu sinbunnu. 2002 amihcaan, pikawawan u saungayay a bangga Studio Pierrot duduc tu nisumad a bangga nu misaungayaya i tilibi a "Huw-ing-zenay" malingatu i Zipu Tukiw a tilibi tahkal. 2004 a mihcaan, macakat ku bangnga sumad han palaiga. 2006 a mihcaan Syen-wo-min a tademaw micumud i Ameylika a "sinbun" nu Zipinay u 10 a bulad 18 a demiad anipatahkal tu micidekay anipili'an "u kasenengay i hamin nu kitakit tu 100 ku tademaw nu Zipu". Jump" Studio Pierrot ".
S.PHON: ħuw-iŋ-zən-ʦə **** "ħuw-iŋ-zən-ʦə" ʔ~ʡkamu nu zipun, "na*uto -***- , nipaŋaŋan, ħuw-iŋ, u baŋga nu zipun nisaŋaʔ~ʡan ni an-pən-ʦi-s nu masakapaħaj a baŋga, musakamu tu ħumħum sanaj mir~ɾiwr~ɾiw tu kitakit u mar~ɾuaadaj ʦi si-jən-wo-min-zən atu ʦi i-ʦə-pow-ʦwo-ʦu iza ħənaj ku tatusaaj a tadəmaw, tuzuma a mar~ɾaaŋaŋaj nikajzaan a kuŋku. u baŋgu namakaj **** a miħʦaan mar~ɾiŋatu i zipu a ʦi-iŋ-zə tuŋusaj nu masakapaħaj baŋgu zasi "sinbun nu masakapaħaj *ump" tu r~ɾar~ɾid nu sinbunnu. **** amiħʦaan, pikawawan u sauŋajaj a baŋga studio piərrot duduʦ tu nisumad a baŋga nu misauŋajaja i tir~ɾibi a "ħuw-iŋ-zənaj" mar~ɾiŋatu i zipu tukiw a tir~ɾibi taħkar~ɾ. **** a miħʦaan, maʦakat ku baŋŋa sumad ħan par~ɾaiga. **** a miħʦaan sjən-wo-min a tadəmaw miʦumud i amər~ɾika a "sinbun" nu zipinaj u ** a bur~ɾad ** a dəmiad anipataħkar~ɾ tu miʦidəkaj anipir~ɾiʔ~ʡan "u kasənəŋaj i ħamin nu kitakit tu *** ku tadəmaw nu zipu". *ump" studio piərrot ".
